# kCTFontFeatureTypeNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontFeatureTypeNameKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypenamekey)

-  kCTFontFeatureTypeNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFeatureTypeNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFeatureTypeNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeaturetypenamekey#Discussion)

Key to get the localized font feature type name as a `CFString` object.
